description_long: This is a wide-brimmed, tan-colored hat with a high, gently tapered crown and a smooth, continuous surface. The brim is broad and flat, providing ample shade, and it encircles the entire crown evenly. A dark brown band wraps around the base of the crown, adding a subtle decorative accent and visual contrast to the lighter tan body. The material appears to be a soft, felt-like fabric, giving the hat a matte, slightly textured finish. There are no visible logos, embroidery, or additional embellishments on the exterior. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for sun protection and stylish wear in urban environments.
description: A tan, wide-brimmed felt hat with a high, tapered crown and a dark brown band around its base. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with no visible logos or extra decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat brim and the high, gently tapered crown with the brown band clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hat's broad brim and the smooth, continuous curve of the crown, with the band partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the even width of the brim and the back of the crown with the band encircling it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the hat's profile and the consistent shape of the brim and crown.
